prose:
Fukui reactivity analysis on benzaldehyde using DFT (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, tier standard, density-fitted, PySCF) in gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Partial charges computed via Mulliken scheme. Input geometry from user-supplied benzaldehyde.xyz (single-point, not re-optimized). Fukui indices (f⁺, f⁻, f⁰) and dual descriptor (Δf) computed for the neutral, cationic (charge +1, multiplicity 2), and anionic (charge −1, multiplicity 2) states. Most electrophilic site: C (atom index 2, aromatic ortho carbon), f⁺ = 0.399. Most nucleophilic site: O (aldehyde oxygen, atom index 0), f⁻ = 0.238. Fukui charge conservation checks passed (sum(f⁺) = 1.0000, sum(f⁻) = 1.0000). Integrity status: trustworthy. A Fukui index visualization plot has been generated at /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/benzaldehyde/argo_claude-haiku-4.5/20260702-202108_benzaldehyde_fukui_reactivity/agent_call_01_plot.png. Full site-wise results (f⁺, f⁻, f⁰, Δf) are tabulated in the report above.</prose>
